title: Reflex Screen Alert
subtitlePlaying: Round {{current}}/{{total}}: Test your screen balance reflexes!
readyText:
Identify balanced screen choices!
You have {{time}} seconds for each question.
readySubtext: You have {{total}} questions with {{time}} seconds each!

questions.text: A young news reporter needs to stay focused for a live morning segment. Which evening habit helps alertness?

options.text: Watch one more episode before bed
Log off from games an hour early

questions.text: A junior astronaut trainee wants to practice star charts in the morning. What screen habit helps?

options.text: Take short breaks from screen while practicing

questions.text: A forest guide-in-training needs to identify bird sounds in the morning. What night habit keeps eyes fresh?

options.text: Rest your eyes and stretch after screen time

questions.text: A classroom helper wants to stay cheerful and attentive. What is a balanced screen choice?

options.text: Limit screen time to short sessions
Ignore screen limits and continue playing
Combine TV, tablet, and phone use at once

questions.text: A young game designer needs energy and focus tomorrow. Which habit is best tonight?

options.text: Play on all devices at once
